## Overview
Amazon Nova Lite is an AI model provided by Amazon Web Services. We are currently updating our AI analysis for this model.

|--------|-------|
| Input | $0.06 |
| Output | $0.24 |

| Batch Input | $0.03 |
| Batch Output | $0.12 |
